title: Transcatheter mitral valve replacement: LIVE Educational Case from University Medical Center - Mainz, Germany
subtitle: With the collaboration of the PCR Mitral Focus Group

title: Managing complex calcified PCI: pitfalls and complications
learningObjectives: To appraise the importance of imaging in the procedural strategy aiming at minimising the risk of complications
To be updated on the contemporary tools and techniques to prevent complications in PCI of heavily calcified lesions
To share experience on how to optimally manage the most common complications (dissections, perforation and stent under-expansion)

title: How to manage an entrapped rotational atherectomy burr?
learningObjectives: To understand the anatomical and technical factors leading to rotational atherectomy burr entrapment
To learn the different techniques to dislodge an entrapped rotational atherectomy burr
To prevent this complication by adequate lesion selection and identification of risk factors

title: Management of coronary artery disease in TAVI candidates after PRO-TAVI - Indications for LAA closure after CHAMPION-AF
learningObjectives: To reflect about the impact of recent trials on daily practice
To discuss about the optimal management of coronary artery disease in TAVI candidates
To review the current indication of LAA closure

title: CTO BASIC Level I : LIVE Educational Cases from Institut Cardiovasculaire Paris Sud, France & University Hospital Basel, Switzerland
subtitle: With the collaboration of the Euro CTO Club
learningObjectives: To understand the basic pathophysiology and angiographic characteristics of CTOs
To perform a structured angiographic analysis of a CTO
To learn the fundamentals of guide catheter support, wire escalation, and microcatheter use

title: Complication management in calcified lesions (Stuck rota burr, coronary perforation)

To learn the different tools that ULTREON 2 Software offers for PCI planning and optimisation
To understand the importance of assessing post-PCI result

title: Hands-on IVUS - PCI guidance and optimisation
learningObjectives: To understand the importance of a detailed planning guided with IVUS imaging
To learn the different tools that AVVIGO viewer offers for PCI planning and optimisation
To understand the importance of assessing post-PCI result

title: New frontiers: TAVI for aortic regurgitation with conventional and dedicated devices
learningObjectives: To recognise the challenges of TAVI for pure aortic regurgitation
To understand how best to treat pure aortic regurgitation with conventional transcatheter heart valves
To learn more about dedicated devices for TAVI in aortic regurgitation

subtitle: Session comprising selected EuroPCR 2026 clinical cases submissions

title: A critical appraisal of the recent evidence in the LAA closure field
learningObjectives: To learn about the trial designs and results of the most impactful recent LAA closure and direct oral anticoagulants trials (CHAMPION-AF, CLOSURE AF)
To learn how this evidence may change patient selection for LAA closure
To know how to implement this new evidence in the LAA closure field into daily clinical practice

title: Complex femoral access for TAVI

To develop a toolbox to safely and successfully manage calcified femoral access
